creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 250863
git diff against mail/bogofilter-bdb

This pr(1) updates BDB in mail/bogofilter-bdb to version 18.
While here improve Makefile && fix a patch.

Affected files:
mail/bogofilter-bdb/Makefile
mail/bogofilter-bdb/files/patch-contrib__trainbogo.sh

All tests return OK.

That's it.

--Chris
